data.title: Kevin O'Leary Calls For Hefty 400% US Tariffs On China: 'They Don't Play By The Rules'
data.description: Kevin O'Leary, also known as Mr. Wonderful from the TV show Shark Tank, has called for a 400% tariff on China, arguing that the current 104% tariff imposed by President Donald Trump is not enough.

data.title: How To Trade SPY As China Spews Retaliatory Tariffs: Technical Analysis
data.description: Technical Analysis: SPY could hit a bullish ceiling of $496.93, but under intense selling pressure, the downside could be as low as $484.60.

data.title: Bitcoin Stuck Below $80,000: What's Coming Next?
data.description: Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC) is struggling to get back above the $80,000 level, which traders have identified as a crucial area of resistance.

data.title: Wall Street's 'American Exceptionalism' Trade Falters As Dollar, Stocks, Bonds All Slide
data.description: U.S. assets were once a staple in global investment portfolios, but escalating trade tensions have shattered investor confidence, causing a rare bond selloff and raising concerns about the safety of American assets.

data.title: Users Risk Buying Smartphones Preloaded With Crypto-Stealing Malware: What You Need To Know
